SHOOT.title: Shoot
SHOOT.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Fire current chamber. +4 damage. If empty, draw 1 and rotate.|Fire current chamber. If empty, draw 1 and rotate.}
DEFEND_GUNSLINGER.title: Defend
PANNING.title: Panning
PANNING.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Fire all loaded bullets in order at the target. Each shot deals +6 damage.|Fire all loaded bullets in order at the target. Each shot deals +4 damage.}
SPRAY_FIRE.title: Spray Fire
SPRAY_FIRE.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Fire all loaded bullets at random enemies. Each shot deals +2 damage.|Fire all loaded bullets at random enemies.}
SEAL_LOAD.title: Seal Load
SEAL_LOAD.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Load 1 Seal round. If a new one is loaded, add a temporary Seal Shot to your hand. Otherwise, raise a loaded Seal's level by 1. Gain 6 Block.|Load 1 Seal round. If a new one is loaded, add a temporary Seal Shot to your hand. Otherwise, raise a loaded Seal's level by 1. Gain 4 Block.}
SIGIL_GUARD.title: Sigil Guard
SIGIL_GUARD.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Gain 7 Block. Gain additional Block equal to your highest loaded Seal level.|Gain 5 Block. Gain additional Block equal to your highest loaded Seal level.}
SEAL_RITE.title: Seal Priming
SEAL_RITE.description: {IfUpgraded:show:(1) Power: At turn start, load 1 Seal round. Whenever you fire a Seal round, the next Seal round gains +1 level. If none are loaded, load 1 and add a temporary Seal Shot.|Power: At turn start, load 1 Seal round. Whenever you fire a Seal round, the next Seal round gains +1 level. If none are loaded, load 1 and add a temporary Seal Shot.}
SEAL_IMPRINT.title: Seal Imprint
SEAL_IMPRINT.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Set the loaded Seal bullet's level to at least 7.|Set the loaded Seal bullet's level to at least 5.}
SEAL_RELEASE_KAI.title: Seal Release: Kai
SEAL_RELEASE_KAI.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Fire all loaded Seal rounds in order. Whenever one kills, load or raise a Seal round by 2.|Fire all loaded Seal rounds in order. Whenever one kills, load or raise a Seal round by 1.}
SILVER_BULLET.title: Silver Bullet
UNLOAD.title: Unload
SABOTAGE.title: Sabotage
SABOTAGE.description: All enemies lose 5 Strength until end of turn.
STEADY_AIM.title: Steady Aim
STEADY_AIM.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Rotate the cylinder. Draw 1 card.|Rotate the cylinder.}
EMPTY_THE_MAGAZINE.title: Empty the Magazine
EMPTY_THE_MAGAZINE.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Remove all loaded bullets. Gain Block equal to bullets removed +1. Draw 1 card per 2 bullets removed. If you removed 3+ bullets, gain 1 [gold]Energy[/gold].|Remove all loaded bullets. Gain Block equal to bullets removed. Draw 1 card per 2 bullets removed. If you removed 4+ bullets, gain 1 [gold]Energy[/gold].}
TRACER_LOAD.title: Tracer Load
TRACER_LOAD.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Load 4 Tracer rounds. Draw 1 card.|Load 3 Tracer rounds. Draw 1 card.}
TRACER_CONVERSION.title: Tracer Conversion
TRACER_CONVERSION.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Convert up to 2 loaded Normal bullets into Tracer bullets. Draw 1 card.|Convert up to 2 loaded Normal bullets into Tracer bullets.}
READ_THE_MARK.title: Read the Mark
READ_THE_MARK.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Gain {Block:diff()} Block. Draw 2 cards and rotate the cylinder.|Gain {Block:diff()} Block. If you have at least 1 Ricochet, draw 2 cards and rotate the cylinder.}
WALKING_FIRE.title: Walking Fire
WALKING_FIRE.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Trigger Pull 3 times. If a Tracer shot succeeds, load 1 Tracer round.|Trigger Pull 2 times. If a Tracer shot succeeds, load 1 Tracer round.}
CROSSFIRE_RHYTHM.title: Crossfire Rhythm
CROSSFIRE_RHYTHM.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Trigger Pull 1 time for +3 damage. If you fired a Tracer this turn, draw 1 and load 1 Tracer round.|Trigger Pull 1 time for +2 damage. If you fired a Tracer this turn, draw 1.}
TAKE_COVER.title: Take Cover
TAKE_COVER.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Gain {Block:diff()} Block. Gain +1 Block per empty chamber.|Gain {Block:diff()} Block. Gain +1 Block per empty chamber.}
EXECUTION_SHOT.title: Execution Shot
EXECUTION_SHOT.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Trigger Pull 1 time for 14 damage. If target is at or below half HP, deal 14 additional damage.|Trigger Pull 1 time for 10 damage. If target is at or below half HP, deal 12 additional damage.}
PRECISION_SHOT.title: Precision Shot
PRECISION_SHOT.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Trigger Pull 1 time for +3 damage. Gain 2 Ricochet.|Trigger Pull 1 time for +3 damage. Gain 1 Ricochet.}
QUICK_RACK.title: Quick Rack
QUICK_RACK.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Trigger Pull 1 time. Load 2 Tracer rounds. Draw 1 card.|Trigger Pull 1 time. Load 1 Tracer round. Draw 1 card.}
HOT_CHAMBER.title: Hot Chamber
HOT_CHAMBER.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Trigger Pull 1 time for +6 damage. If the fired round was Tracer, load 1 Tracer round and draw 1 card.|Trigger Pull 1 time for +4 damage. If the fired round was Tracer, load 1 Tracer round and draw 1 card.}
CHAIN_BURST.title: Chain Burst
CHAIN_BURST.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Trigger Pull 2 times. If a Tracer shot succeeds, trigger pull 2 additional times.|Trigger Pull 1 time. If a Tracer shot succeeds, trigger pull 1 additional time.}
OVERCLOCK_DRUM.title: Overclock Drum
OVERCLOCK_DRUM.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Power: Your first Tracer shot each turn deals 8 additional damage and loads 1 Tracer round. Costs 1.|Power: Your first Tracer shot each turn deals 8 additional damage and loads 1 Tracer round.}
GRAND_RITE.title: Grand Rite
GRAND_RITE.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Distribute +3 Seal Levels among your loaded Seal rounds. Move the highest-level Seal round into the firing chamber. Fire it 1 time.|Distribute +2 Seal Levels among your loaded Seal rounds. Move the highest-level Seal round into the firing chamber. Fire it 1 time.}
SEAL_SEARCH.title: Seal Search
SEAL_SEARCH.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Move your highest-level loaded Seal round to the firing chamber. Draw 2 cards.|Move your highest-level loaded Seal round to the firing chamber. Draw 1 card.}
SEAL_OPEN.title: Seal Open
SEAL_OPEN.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Move your highest-level loaded Seal round to the firing chamber. Raise it by 1. Draw 1 card.|Move your highest-level loaded Seal round to the firing chamber.}
SEAL_AMPLIFY.title: Seal Amplify
SEAL_AMPLIFY.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Increase all loaded Seal rounds by 2 levels.|Increase all loaded Seal rounds by 1 level.}
SEAL_RESONANCE.title: Seal Resonance
SEAL_RESONANCE.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Move your highest-level loaded Seal round to the firing chamber and fire it. Then deal bonus damage equal to 3 times its level.|Move your highest-level loaded Seal round to the firing chamber and fire it. Then deal bonus damage equal to 2 times its level.}
ECHO_NOTE.title: Echo Note
ECHO_NOTE.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Draw 2 cards. If you fired a Tracer this turn, draw 1 additional card.|Draw 1 card. If you fired a Tracer this turn, draw 1 additional card.}
ETCHED_TRACER.title: Etched Tracer
ETCHED_TRACER.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Trigger Pull 1 time at target enemy. Then load 2 Tracer round(s).|Trigger Pull 1 time at target enemy. Then load 1 Tracer round(s).}
CHAMBER_SWAP_NEXT.title: Chamber Swap Next
CHAMBER_SWAP_NEXT.description: Swap the current firing chamber with the next chamber.
EVASION.title: Evasion
EVASION.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Gain 10 Block. This turn, reduce incoming damage by up to 14.|Gain 8 Block. This turn, reduce incoming damage by up to 10.}
RELOAD.title: Reload
RELOAD.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Load 3 Standard rounds. Draw 1 card.|Load 2 Standard rounds.}
IMPRINT_COMPRESSION.title: Ricochet Compression
RICOCHET_COMPRESSION.title: Ricochet Compression
OVERCLOCK_CHARGE.title: Overclock Charge
BALLISTIC_COMPILER.title: Ballistic Compiler
IMPRINT_COMPRESSION.description: {IfUpgraded:show:At the start of your turn, if you have at least 2 Ricochet, draw 1 card.|At the start of your turn, if you have at least 3 Ricochet, draw 1 card.}
RICOCHET_COMPRESSION.description: {IfUpgraded:show:At the start of your turn, if you have at least 2 Ricochet, draw 1 card.|At the start of your turn, if you have at least 3 Ricochet, draw 1 card.}
IMPRINT_SQUEEZE.title: Ricochet Squeeze
IMPRINT_SQUEEZE.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Discard 1 card. Gain 3 Ricochet.|Discard 1 card. Gain 2 Ricochet.}
RICOCHET_SQUEEZE.title: Ricochet Squeeze
RICOCHET_SQUEEZE.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Discard 1 card. Gain 3 Ricochet.|Discard 1 card. Gain 2 Ricochet.}
OVERCLOCK_CHARGE.description: {IfUpgraded:show:On your 3rd successful shot each turn, gain 1 [gold]Energy[/gold]. Gain 1 Ricochet. Innate.|On your 3rd successful shot each turn, gain 1 [gold]Energy[/gold]. Gain 1 Ricochet.}
BALLISTIC_COMPILER.description: {IfUpgraded:show:On your first Tracer shot each turn, draw 1 card and gain 2 Ricochet.|On your first Tracer shot each turn, draw 1 card and gain 1 Ricochet.}
SEAL_PRIMER.title: Seal Primer
SEAL_PRIMER.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Load 1 Seal round. Increase the lowest loaded Seal level by 2.|Load 1 Seal round. Increase the lowest loaded Seal level by 1.}
SEAL_PROTECTION.title: Seal Protection
SEAL_PROTECTION.description: {IfUpgraded:show:(0) Your next 2 Seal shots do not consume their Seal rounds.|Your next 2 Seal shots do not consume their Seal rounds.}
SEAL_TRANSFER.title: Seal Transfer
SEAL_TRANSFER.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Move half of the highest Seal level to the lowest loaded Seal round. The target gains +1 additional Seal level.|Move half of the highest Seal level to the lowest loaded Seal round.}
SEAL_OVERLOAD.title: Seal Overload
SEAL_OVERLOAD.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Load 2 temporary Seal rounds.|Load 1 temporary Seal round.}
SEAL_ASSIMILATION.title: Seal Assimilation
SEAL_ASSIMILATION.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Exhaust. Retain. Set all loaded Seal rounds to the highest loaded Seal level.|Exhaust. Set all loaded Seal rounds to the highest loaded Seal level.}
CASING_COUNT.title: Casing Count
CASING_COUNT.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Gain Ricochet equal to empty chambers (max 3). Draw 1 card.|Gain Ricochet equal to empty chambers (max 3). }
FINAL_VOLLEY.title: Final Volley
FINAL_VOLLEY.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Trigger Pull 3 times. If the first 2 shots succeed, gain 1 [gold]Energy[/gold].|Trigger Pull 2 times. If the first 2 shots succeed, gain 1 [gold]Energy[/gold].}
GRAND_CHAMBER.title: Grand Chamber
GRAND_CHAMBER.description: {IfUpgraded:show:If a Seal bullet is loaded: draw 2 cards, align that Seal to the firing chamber, and increase its level by 1. (Costs 1).|If a Seal bullet is loaded: draw 2 cards, align that Seal to the firing chamber, and increase its level by 1.}
DEAD_ANGLE.title: Dead Angle
DEAD_ANGLE.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Gain 3 Ricochet. Draw 1 card. (Costs 0).|Gain 3 Ricochet. Draw 1 card.}
RICOCHET_PRIMER.title: Ricochet Primer
BANK_SHOT.title: Bank Shot
BANK_SHOT.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Trigger Pull 1 time. If you have Ricochet, consume 1 Ricochet and deal an additional {Damage:diff()} damage.|Trigger Pull 1 time. If you have Ricochet, consume 1 Ricochet and deal an additional {Damage:diff()} damage.}
TRACER_STRIKE.title: Tracer Strike
TRACER_STRIKE.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Load 2 Tracer bullets. Trigger Pull 1 time.|Load 1 Tracer bullet. Trigger Pull 1 time.}
HUNT_TRIGGER.title: Hunt Trigger
HUNT_TRIGGER.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Trigger Pull 1 time. If you fired a Tracer this turn, Trigger Pull 2 additional times. Otherwise, load 1 Tracer round.|Trigger Pull 1 time. If you fired a Tracer this turn, Trigger Pull 1 additional time. Otherwise, load 1 Tracer round.}
RICOCHET_FOLLOW_UP.title: Ricochet Follow-Up
RICOCHET_FOLLOW_UP.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Trigger Pull 1 time. If you have Ricochet, Trigger Pull 1 additional time.|Trigger Pull 1 time. If you have Ricochet, draw 1 card.}
HUNT_PREP.title: Hunt Prep
HUNT_PREP.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Count as having fired a Tracer this turn. Load 2 Tracer rounds. Draw 2 cards.|Count as having fired a Tracer this turn. Load 2 Tracer rounds. Draw 1 card.}
HUNT_RELOAD.title: Hunt Reload
HUNT_RELOAD.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Load 1 Tracer round. If you fired a Tracer this turn, load 1 more and draw 1 card.|Load 1 Tracer round. If you fired a Tracer this turn, load 1 more.}
BARRAGE_COLLAPSE.title: Barrage Collapse
BARRAGE_COLLAPSE.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Gain 5 Ricochet. This turn, for the first 5 Ricochet triggers, deal 3 damage to all other enemies.|Gain 4 Ricochet. This turn, for the first 4 Ricochet triggers, deal 3 damage to all other enemies.}
SEAL_PRESSURE.title: Seal Pressure
SEAL_PRESSURE.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Attempt to load Seal rounds 2 times (if already loaded, increase Seal Level by 1 instead). If at least one new Seal round is loaded, add a temporary Seal Shot to your hand.|Attempt to load Seal rounds 1 time (if already loaded, increase Seal Level by 1 instead). If a new Seal round is loaded, add a temporary Seal Shot to your hand.}
BRANDED_SHOT.title: Branded Shot
BRANDED_SHOT.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Trigger Pull 1 time. On successful shot, gain 2 Ricochet.|Trigger Pull 1 time. On successful shot, gain 1 Ricochet.}
TRACER_STORM.title: Tracer Storm
IMPRINT_SEAL.title: Seal Etching
IMPRINT_SEAL.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Increase all loaded Seal rounds by 2 levels.|Increase all loaded Seal rounds by 1 level.}
SEAL_ETCHING.title: Seal Etching
SEAL_ETCHING.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Increase all loaded Seal rounds by 2 levels.|Increase all loaded Seal rounds by 1 level.}
TRACER_BRAND.title: Tracer Brand
TRACER_BRAND.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Load 1 Tracer round. Gain 2 Ricochet per living enemy.|Load 1 Tracer round. Gain 1 Ricochet per living enemy.}
RICOCHET_BURST.title: Ricochet Burst
RICOCHET_BURST.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Trigger Pull 1 time. If the fired round is Tracer, gain 2 Ricochet.|Trigger Pull 1 time. If the fired round is Tracer, gain 1 Ricochet.}
SEAL_BURST_LOAD.title: Seal Burst Load
SEAL_BURST_LOAD.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Attempt to load Seal rounds 2 times (if already loaded, increase Seal Level by 1 instead). If at least one new Seal round is loaded, add a temporary Seal Shot to your hand. Then increase the highest loaded Seal Level by 1.|Attempt to load Seal rounds 1 time (if already loaded, increase Seal Level by 1 instead). If a new Seal round is loaded, add a temporary Seal Shot to your hand. Then increase the highest loaded Seal Level by 1.}
ETCHED_RESONANCE.title: Etched Resonance
ETCHED_RESONANCE.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Load Tracer rounds equal to highest Seal Level. Reduce all loaded Seal levels to 1.|Load Tracer rounds equal to highest Seal Level. Reduce all loaded Seal levels to 0.}
SEAL_RAMPAGE.title: Seal Rampage
SEAL_RAMPAGE.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Reduce your highest loaded Seal round by up to 1 level. Gain 1 Energy. Draw 1 card.|Reduce your highest loaded Seal round by up to 2 levels. Gain 1 Energy.}
SEAL_INSIGHT.title: Seal Insight
SEAL_INSIGHT.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Draw 1 card. If you have a loaded Seal round, draw 1 more. If its level is 3 or higher, draw 2 more.|Draw 1 card. If you have a loaded Seal round, draw 1 more. If its level is 3 or higher, draw 1 more.}
SEAL_BARRIER.title: Seal Barrier
SEAL_BARRIER.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Gain 14 Block. Gain additional Block equal to twice your highest loaded Seal level.|Gain 10 Block. Gain additional Block equal to twice your highest loaded Seal level.}
SEAL_SHOT.title: Seal Shot
SEAL_SHOT.description: Move the highest-level loaded Seal bullet into the firing chamber. Fire it 1 time. Exhaust.
